case_title: REDA BOUALI VS. AUDIO MEDIA PRODUCTION, INC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOUALI, REDA AS TO DEFENDANT AUDIO MEDIA PRODUCTION, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
